# JLCPCB Order 11814971A — SMT026051163079_Y34

Below are the two reference images for the U1 / U2 orientation question on this order. The Amazon secure-attachment links have not been working on your end, so I'm hosting the images here as a direct link instead.

## Required orientation

- **U1 pin 1:** 12 o'clock position — this is **180° rotated** from the orientation shown in your most recent DFM image.
- **U2 pin 1:** 3 o'clock position — the orientation in your DFM image is **correct**.

Please apply the U1 rotation and proceed.

## Reference images

**1. Corrected component placement (annotated over your DFM image):**

![Corrected U1/U2 orientation — 11814971A_Y34, SMT026051163079, 2026-05-14](/images/JLC/11814971A_Y34.SMT026051163079_Corrected_20260514.png)

**2. Excerpt from the QHT-004485A PCA fabrication drawing showing the intended orientation:**

![QHT-004485A PCA fabrication drawing excerpt](/images/JLC/QHT-004485A_PCAFAB_Excerpt.png)

If anything is still unclear, please reply to the email thread and I'll follow up.
